# deck/sections/ — superseded drafts, do not edit

These per-section files were the pre-merge sources for the first Course 2 deck
build. The merged deck (`deck/course2.md`) has since been edited directly and
has diverged: the 自學備註 note layer was stripped, planned 問全班 prompts were
reworked, and Loop 1 was rebuilt around the 像素撞牆站（/pixel-shuffle，2026-07）
replacing the 順序撞牆站 described in `01-loop1.md`.

**`deck/course2.md` is the single source of truth.** These files are kept for
history only; nothing renders or merges from them.
